languages.text:
Cyber Mastif has +10 Strength and +100% Damage
If at the end of Overseer's turn their Cybermasiff is adjacent to an enemy, Overseer gains +1 Resolve until the end of combat.

languages.text:
The cyber-mastiff gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and deals +100% more damage.
If the cyber-mastiff is adjacent to an enemy at the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the Overseer gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:

If the cyber-mastiff is adjacent to an enemy at the end of the Overseer's turn, the Overseer gains +1 resolve until the end of combat. Stacks.

languages.text:
Siber mastif, +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Kuvvet{/g} niteliği kazanır ve +%100 daha fazla hasar verir.
Siber mastif, {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}'in {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} sona erdiğinde bir düşmanın bitişiğindeyse Gözetmen +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}kararlılık{/g} kazanır. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.

traits.locale_text:
Siber mastif, +10 Kuvvet niteliği kazanır ve +%100 daha fazla hasar verir.
Siber mastif, Gözetmen'in turu sona erdiğinde bir düşmanın bitişiğindeyse Gözetmen +1 kararlılık kazanır. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.

languages.text:
El cibermastín recibe +10 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Fuerza{/g} e inflige un +100 % de daño adicional.
Si el cibermastín está adyacente a un enemigo al final del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g}, este gana +1 de {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}firmeza{/g} hasta el final del combate. Este efecto es acumulativo.
languages.original_text:

If the cyber-mastiff is adjacent to an enemy at the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the Overseer gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
El cibermastín recibe +10 de Fuerza e inflige un +100 % de daño adicional.
Si el cibermastín está adyacente a un enemigo al final del turno del supervisor, este gana +1 de firmeza hasta el final del combate. Este efecto es acumulativo.

languages.text:
生化獒犬的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力量{/g}提高10点，造成的伤害提高100%。
当{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，如果生化獒犬与敌人相邻，则监察官获得+1{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}决心{/g}。此效果可叠加，持续至战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and deals +100% more damage.
If the cyber-mastiff is adjacent to an enemy at the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the Overseer gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
生化獒犬的力量提高10点，造成的伤害提高100%。
当监察官的回合结束时，如果生化獒犬与敌人相邻，则监察官获得+1决心。此效果可叠加，持续至战斗结束。

languages.text:
Der Cyber-Mastiff erhält +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Stärke{/g} und verursacht +100 % mehr Schaden.
Wenn der Cyber-Mastiff am Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} des {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Aufsehers{/g} an einen Gegner angrenzt, erhält der Aufseher bis zum Ende des Kampfes +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Entschlossenheit{/g}. Stapelbar.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and deals +100% more damage.
If the cyber-mastiff is adjacent to an enemy at the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the Overseer gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
Der Cyber-Mastiff erhält +10 Stärke und verursacht +100 % mehr Schaden.
Wenn der Cyber-Mastiff am Ende des Zuges des Aufsehers an einen Gegner angrenzt, erhält der Aufseher bis zum Ende des Kampfes +1 Entschlossenheit. Stapelbar.

languages.text:
Le cyber-mastiff gagne +10 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Force{/g} et inflige +100 % de dégâts supplémentaires.
Si le cyber-mastiff est adjacent à un ennemi à la fin du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} du {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g}, ce dernier gagne +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Détermination{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat. Cumulable.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and deals +100% more damage.
If the cyber-mastiff is adjacent to an enemy at the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the Overseer gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
Le cyber-mastiff gagne +10 de Force et inflige +100 % de dégâts supplémentaires.
Si le cyber-mastiff est adjacent à un ennemi à la fin du tour du surveillant, ce dernier gagne +1 Détermination jusqu'à la fin du combat. Cumulable.

languages.text:
サイバーマスチフの腕力が+10され、与えるダメージが+100%上昇する。
監督者のターン終了時、サイバーマスチフが敵に隣接している場合、その監督者は戦闘終了まで決断力が+1される。この効果はスタックする。
languages.original_text:

languages.text:
Кибермастиф получает +10 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Силе{/g} и +100% к наносимому урону.
Если в конце {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} надзирателя он находится на клетке, соседней с врагом, надзиратель получает +1 к {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимости{/g} до конца боя. Суммируется.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff gains +10 Strength and deals +100% more damage.
If the cyber-mastiff is adjacent to an enemy at the end of the Overseer's turn, the Overseer gains +1 resolve until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
Кибермастиф получает +10 к Силе и +100% к наносимому урону.
Если в конце хода надзирателя он находится на клетке, соседней с врагом, надзиратель получает +1 к решимости до конца боя. Суммируется.

Кибермастиф получает +10 к Силе и +100% к наносимому урону.
